title: SEC DG, Dr. Emomotimi Agama, Honored as Fellow of Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers - FinancialEDGE
description: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has been conferred with the prestigious Fellowship of the Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (CIS) at the 28th Stockbrokers Conference held in Ibadan. This esteemed recognition underscores Dr. Agama's outstanding contributions to the Nigerian capital market. The investiture ceremony brought together prominent figures
html:
The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has been conferred with the prestigious Fellowship of the Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (CIS) at the 28th Stockbrokers Conference held in Ibadan.

This esteemed recognition underscores Dr. Agama’s outstanding contributions to the Nigerian capital market.

The investiture ceremony brought together prominent figures in the industry, including Dr. Akeem Oyewale, 2nd Vice President of CIS; Mr. Oluropo Dada, President and Chairman of Council, CIS; and Mr. Josiah Akerewusi, Registrar and Chief Executive of CIS.

This honor is a testament to Dr. Agama’s dedication to promoting a vibrant and stable capital market in Nigeria. As the SEC DG, he has been instrumental in shaping policies and regulations that foster growth and investor confidence.

Left to Right: 2nd Vice President Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers Dr. Akeem Oyewale, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission, Dr. Emomotimi Agama, President and Chairman of Council CIS, Mr. Oluropo Dada and Registrar and Chief Executive CIS, Mr. Josiah Akerewusi during the investiture of the SEC DG as a Fellow of CIS at the 28th Stockbrokers Conference in Ibadan Weekend.
